metadata.token_rule: train-only MinMax; z=(x-min)/(max-min); clipped [0,1]; token=floor(K*z); clipped [0,K-1]; exactly K bins

core_metrics.entropy_norm: -sum(p_i log p_i) / log(bins_used), computed over used token bins only

decision_rule.transform: preserve_ratio < preserve_threshold OR compression_factor > compression_threshold OR (raw_unique > K AND entropy_norm < entropy_threshold)
